query:
SELECT 
  pc.id,
  pc.partnerId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  pc.profitRatioStage1Partner,
  pc.expenseCoverage
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%重庆%' AND pc.contractStatus = 'active';
